subcodes.first_line: Glorified art Thou, O Thou through Whose Name the sincere have hastened to the Dayspring of the lights of Thy countenance, and they who are nigh have rushed unto the Orient of Thy signs [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: سبحانک یا من باسمک سرع الموحدون الی مطلع انوار وجهک و المقربون الی مشرق آیات
subcodes.subjects: @Word of God is its own standard, @status of kings; future of monarchy, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @prayer for protection, @rejection, opposition and persecution, @call to action, @proclamation to people of the Bayan, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @teaching the Cause; call to teach
